mapper.insert: insert into file_info ( file_name, original_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, file_hash, storage_type, bucket_name, storage_path, access_url, access_scope, biz_type, biz_id, owner_type, owner_id, status, ref_count, expire_time, last_access_time, delete_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{fileName}, #{originalName}, #{fileExt}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{storageType}, #{bucketName}, #{storagePath}, #{accessUrl}, #{accessScope}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{status}, #{refCount}, #{expireTime}, #{lastAccessTime}, #{deleteTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select file_id, file_name, original_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, file_hash, storage_type, bucket_name, storage_path, access_url, access_scope, biz_type, biz_id, owner_type, owner_id, status, ref_count, expire_time, last_access_time, delete_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from file_info where file_id = #{fileId}
